zh.St Clements, Cornwall, England, United K: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 克萊門特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Ann Barley於1439年出生在英國可瓦爾聖 克萊門特時，她的父親Henry Barley Sheriff of Essex14歲，母親Anne Colville Allington16歲。她於大約1454年與Sir John William Nicolas Clement Sr.在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1481年在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 克萊門特享年42歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾聖 克萊門特。

nameMeanings.name: Barley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Barley. Those in Lancashire and Yorkshire are named with Old English bār ‘wild boar’ or bere ‘barley’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. A place of the same name in Hertfordshire has as its first element an unattested Old English byname Be(o)ra (from bera ‘bear’).

English: metonymic occupational name for a grower or seller of barley, from Middle English barli, barlich ‘barley’ (Old English bærlic, originally an adjective derivative of bær ‘barley’, a byform of bere).
Americanized form of South German Behrle or of its Swiss German cognates Beerli, Berli, or Berly, and probably also of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare Berley .

variants.name: Behrle
meanings: South German (Württemberg): from a pet form of Behr ‘bear’, including from a pet form of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with Old High German bero ‘bear’.
Altered form of Norwegian Berle: habitational name from a farmstead in the county of Sogn og Fjordane, so named with Old Norse barth ‘rim, edge’.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Ann Barley was born in 1439, in St Clement, Cornwall, England, her father, Henry Barley Sheriff of Essex, was 14 and her mother, Anne Colville Allington, was 16. She married Sir John William Nicolas Clement Sr. about 1454, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1481, in St Clement, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 42, and was buried in St Clement, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Ann Barley est née en 1439, à St Clement, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Henry Barley Sheriff of Essex, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Anne Colville Allington, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John William Nicolas Clement Sr. environ 1454, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1481, à St Clement, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à St Clement, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.St Clements, Cornwall, England, United K: St Clement, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Ann Barley 1439 in St Clement, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Barley Sheriff of Essex 14 und ihre Mutter Anne Colville Allington 16. Sie hat um 1454 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Sir John William Nicolas Clement Sr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1481 im Alter von 42 Jahren in St Clement, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Clement, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Ann Barley è nata il nel 1439 nel St Clement, Cornwall, England, sua padre, Henry Barley Sheriff of Essex, aveva 14 anni e sua madre, Anne Colville Allington, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Sir John William Nicolas Clement Sr. circa 1454, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1481, nel St Clement, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a St Clement, Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Ann Barleyが1439年にイギリスコルンワルスト クレメントで生まれた時，父Henry Barley Sheriff of Essexは14歳，母Anne Colville Allingtonは16歳であった。約1454年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでSir John William Nicolas Clement Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1481年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルスト クレメントで42歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルスト クレメントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Ann Barley(이)가 1439년 영국 코른월 스트 클레멘트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Barley Sheriff of Essex(은)는 14세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Colville Allington(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1454년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Sir John William Nicolas Clement Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1481년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 클레멘트에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 스트 클레멘트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Ann Barley nasceu em 1439, em St Clement, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry Barley Sheriff of Essex, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Anne Colville Allington, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John William Nicolas Clement Sr. aproximadamente 1454, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1481, em St Clement, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em St Clement, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Ann Barley родилась в 1439 г. в местности ст клемент, корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Henry Barley Sheriff of Essex было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Colville Allington, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John William Nicolas Clement Sr. около 1454 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1481 г. в местности ст клемент, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности ст клемент, корнвалл, Англия.

Se casó con Sir John William Nicolas Clement Sr. aproximadamente 1454, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1481, en St Clement, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en St Clement, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
